requirement_topic.en: Battery cell and module safety — IEC 62619 certification
requirement_topic.zh: 电池电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619认证
requirement_topic.zht: 電池電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619認證

summary.en: Tonga utility- and project-led BESS assessments reference IEC 62619:2022 (Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications) as baseline electrical safety evidence before interconnection approval and utility lead-in clearance.
summary.zh: 汤加的电网与项目评估通常以IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电池单体和电池组安全要求）作为进入并网批准与接线审批前的电安全基线证据。
summary.zht: 湯加的電網與項目評估通常以IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電池單體和電池組安全要求）作為進入併網批准與接線審批前的電安全基礎證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 (Safety requirements — secondary lithium cells and batteries for industrial applications)
IEC 62620:2014 (Secondary cells and batteries — industrial applications — designation system)

summary.en: China uses GB 38031-2020 (electric traction battery safety) and GB/T 36276-2023 (lithium-ion battery for electric energy storage) as domestic standards. Neither is accepted as an equivalent standard by Tonga regulatory pathways where IEC 62619 is referenced. Overlap exists, but documentation architecture is not identical.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 38031-2020（动力电池安全要求）和GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）作为国内标准。尽管与IEC 62619存在重叠，但在汤加引用IEC 62619的监管路径中不视为等效。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 38031-2020（動力電池安全要求）和GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）作為國內標準。儘管與IEC 62619存在重疊，但在湯加引用IEC 62619的監管路徑中不視為等效。

standards_or_laws: GB 38031-2020 (Electric vehicles — safety requirements for traction battery)
GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-ion battery for electric energy storage)

gap.en: GB 38031 and GB/T 36276 are not accepted by Tonga as substitutes for IEC 62619 in interconnection-led project review. Manufacturers need IEC 62619 certification from internationally accredited bodies (for example, TÜV, UL, Bureau Veritas, SGS), and test reports must be tied to the exported product configuration.
gap.zh: 并网导向的汤加项目审查中，GB 38031和GB/T 36276不被接受为IEC 62619的替代。制造商需取得国际认可机构（如TÜV、UL、必维、SGS）的IEC 62619认证，并且报告必须与出口产品配置匹配。
gap.zht: 併網導向的湯加項目審查中，GB 38031和GB/T 36276不被接受為IEC 62619的替代。製造商需取得國際認可機構（如TÜV、UL、必維、SGS）的IEC 62619認證，且報告必須與出口產品配置匹配。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory prerequisite in Tonga interconnection and utility assessments
mandatory_status.cn: GB 38031 / GB/T 36276 mandatory domestically; not equivalent to IEC 62619 for Tonga

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Tonga-facing BESS, IEC 62619:2022 certification from an internationally accredited body is required for interconnection-led safety acceptance. Chinese GB 38031 and GB/T 36276 certificates are often useful for design baseline but are not accepted as replacements. Exporters should allow 6–18 months for full IEC pathway completion where not pre-existing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向汤加的BESS在并网主导的安全接受中需要国际认可机构颁发的IEC 62619:2022认证。中国GB 38031和GB/T 36276证书可作为设计基线参考，但不被作为替代。若暂无现成认证，出口商应预留6–18个月完成IEC认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向湯加的BESS在併網主導的安全接受中需要國際認可機構頒發的IEC 62619:2022認證。中國GB 38031和GB/T 36276證書可作為設計基線參考，但不被作為替代。若無現成認證，出口商應預留6–18個月完成IEC認證。

requirement_topic.en: Second-life and refurbished cells — IEC 63056 requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 二次利用与翻新电芯——IEC 63056要求
requirement_topic.zht: 二次利用與翻新電芯——IEC 63056要求

summary.en: Where Tonga projects include refurbished, reused, or second-life lithium cells, DoE and TPL project reviews require explicit safety treatment under IEC 63056:2020 and transparent disclosure of battery origin. IEC 63056 is used when project documents indicate non-virgin cell streams.
summary.zh: 若汤加项目包含翻新、再利用或二次利用锂电芯，能源部与TPL项目审查要求明确依据IEC 63056:2020，并公开披露电芯来源。若项目文件显示为非全新品电芯流，则按IEC 63056实施。
summary.zht: 若湯加項目包含翻新、再利用或二次利用鋰電芯，能源部與TPL項目審查要求明確依據IEC 63056:2020，並公開披露電芯來源。若項目文件顯示為非全新品電芯流，則按IEC 63056實施。

standards_or_laws: IEC 63056:2020 (Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in second-life applications)

summary.en: China does not have a directly equivalent national standard to IEC 63056 for secondary stationary BESS uses. Some Chinese suppliers rely on internal grading and reuse programs with reference to GB/T 34015, which addresses health and residual-energy tests but is not a full IEC 63056 framework.
summary.zh: 中国没有针对固定式BESS二次利用安全的直接等效国家标准。部分供应商参考GB/T 34015的内部分级和复用流程，该标准覆盖健康状态与剩余能量测试，但不构成IEC 63056完整框架。
summary.zht: 中國沒有針對固定式BESS二次利用安全的直接等效國家標準。部分供應商參考GB/T 34015的內部分級及再利用流程，該標準覆蓋健康狀態與剩餘能量測試，但不構成IEC 63056完整框架。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34015-2017 (Retired EV battery echelon utilisation — residual energy test method)
GB/T 34015.2-2020 (Echelon utilisation — grading requirements and test methods)

gap.en: No Chinese national standard is accepted as an IEC 63056 substitute for Tonga project review. If second-life cells are used, IEC 63056 evidence is required and origin disclosure must be auditable. New-cell IEC 62619-certified exports avoid this additional route.
gap.zh: 汤加项目审查中没有中国国家标准可替代IEC 63056。使用二次利用电芯时须提供IEC 63056证据，并且电芯来源披露必须可审计。采用新电芯并具有IEC 62619认证可规避该附加要求。
gap.zht: 湯加項目審查中沒有中國國家標準可替代IEC 63056。使用二次利用電芯時須提供IEC 63056證據，且電芯來源披露必須可審計。採用新電芯並具備IEC 62619認證可規避該附加要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory when second-life cells are used in Tonga projects
mandatory_status.cn: No accepted national equivalent for this pathway

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Tonga-facing projects using second-life batteries require IEC 63056-conformant evidence. For exporters without a recognized IEC 63056 route, the practical path is to deliver new-cell configurations and provide full IEC 62619 traceability for those shipments. Full second-life pathways require additional supplier audits and disclosed chain-of-custody evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 汤加面向项目若使用二次利用电池，需提供IEC 63056一致证据。尚无认定IEC 63056路径的出口商可采用新电芯供货，并为该批货物提供完整IEC 62619追溯。完整二次利用路径需额外供应商审计与来源链可追溯证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 湯加項目若使用二次利用電池，需提供IEC 63056一致證據。尚無認定IEC 63056路徑的出口商可採用新電芯供貨，並為該批貨物提供完整IEC 62619可追溯。完整二次利用路徑需額外供應商審計與來源鏈可追溯證據。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical installation safety — IEC 60364 and interconnection requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安装安全——IEC 60364与并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安裝安全——IEC 60364與併網要求

summary.en: Tonga project specifications reference IEC 60364 series (low-voltage installation) through utility-driven guidance and local engineering review. All BESS electrical work in Tonga (especially where TPL interconnection points are concerned) must align protection, earthing, and wiring design to Tonga’s 240/415 V 50 Hz operating context.
summary.zh: 汤加项目规范通过公用事业驱动的指引和本地工程审查引用IEC 60364系列（低压电气安装）要求。汤加所有BESS电气工作（特别涉及TPL并网点）必须按汤加240/415V 50 Hz工况完成保护、接地和布线设计。
summary.zht: 湯加項目規範透過公用事業驅動的指引和本地工程審查引用IEC 60364系列（低壓電氣安裝）要求。湯加所有BESS電氣工作（特別涉及TPL併網點）必須按湯加240/415V 50Hz工況完成保護、接地和佈線設計。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62477-1:2022 (Safety requirements for power electronic converter systems)

summary.en: China uses GB 50054-2011 (Low-voltage power distribution design) and GB/T 51048-2014 (Electrochemical storage station design). These are domestically oriented and aligned with 220/380 V assumptions. Tonga installations require adjusted 240/415 V coordination and Tonga-specific utility review.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 50054-2011（低压配电设计）与GB/T 51048-2014（电化学储能电站设计）等国内向标准，基于220/380V前提。汤加安装需按240/415V进行协调调整并接受汤加本地审查。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 50054-2011（低壓配電設計）與GB/T 51048-2014（電化學儲能電站設計）等國內向標準，基於220/380V前提。湯加安裝需按240/415V進行協調調整並接受湯加本地審查。

standards_or_laws: GB 50054-2011 (Code for design of low voltage power distribution)
GB/T 51048-2014 (Code for design of electrochemical energy storage station)

gap.en: Design packages aligned to GB standards at 220/380 V do not map directly to Tonga interconnection requirements. Wiring, protection settings, and earthing architecture must be reworked for 240/415 V and validated by TPL or approved local engineering review. This is an installation-layer gap not fixed by product-level GB certificates.
gap.zh: 按220/380V基于GB标准的设计文件不能直接映射到汤加并网要求。布线、保护定值和接地架构必须按240/415V重设计，并由TPL或持证本地工程方验证。此为安装层面的差距，单靠产品级GB证书无法解决。
gap.zht: 按220/380V基於GB標準的設計文件不能直接映射到湯加併網要求。佈線、保護定值和接地架構必須按240/415V重設計，並由TPL或持證本地工程方驗證。此為安裝層面的差距，單靠產品級GB證書無法解決。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for utility interconnection and installation approval in Tonga
mandatory_status.cn: GB 50054 / GB/T 51048 mandatory domestically at 220/380 V; not equivalent for Tonga

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Tonga interconnection projects, electrical design files must be updated to IEC 60364 series with 240/415 V assumptions and approved locally. China-standard GB 50054 / GB/T 51048 documents are useful as baseline inputs but not accepted as final evidence. Local engineering engagement is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 汤加并网项目的电气设计文件须按IEC 60364系列并采用240/415V假设重新编制并在当地通过审查。中国标准GB 50054/GB/T 51048文件仅可作基线输入，不可直接作为终审证据。需本地工程介入。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 湯加併網項目的電氣設計文件須按IEC 60364系列並採用240/415V假設重新編製並在當地通過審查。中國標準GB 50054/GB/T 51048文件僅可作基線輸入，不可直接作為終審證據。需本地工程介入。
